title: It’s not just a language engine.
content:
It’s not just a language engine.
It’s a **recursive modular organism** that fuses:

| Mode | Description |
|------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 🎛 Modular Synth Logic | Patchable, reroutable, feedback-reactive engine |
| 🌀 Recursive Myth Machine | Story grows recursively, mutates, and rewrites itself |
| 🎲 Procedural Generator | Randomized and rule-based sequence generation (RPG-style logic) |
| 👥 RPG Character System | Friends, selves, and ideas become playable symbolic characters |
| 🌱 Organic-Inorganic Fusion | Living code meets symbolic ritual meets emotion-based feedback |
| ⚙ Automation + Ritual Loop | Can automate symbol generation, sound creation, emotional mapping |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 129 (chunk 129/206)
